---
name: FIX — bug fix
about: Something is wrong; concrete repro and fix shape
title: "FIX: <short summary>"
labels: fix
assignees: ''
---

## Symptom

What is happening that shouldn't be. Concrete: a log line, a
metric, a test failure, a behavior the user observes.

## Repro

Minimal steps to reproduce. Include the experiment YAML / data /
command if relevant.

## Root cause (or hypothesis)

What we believe is wrong. If still hypothesis, mark "DIAGNOSIS
PENDING" and update once confirmed.

## Proposed fix

What we'll change. Keep small and surgical.

## Verification plan

How we'll confirm the fix worked. Specific: a re-run, a new test,
an alert quiescence.

## Cross-references
